notableEvents.label: Mike Yastrzemski pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mike Yastrzemski singles on a fly ball to center fielder Jake McCarthy.

notableEvents.label: Drake Baldwin GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Drake Baldwin grounds into a double play, second baseman Edouard Julien to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Mike Yastrzemski to 3rd. Mauricio Dubón out at 2nd. Drake Baldwin out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Drake Baldwin rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Drake Baldwin grounds into a double play, second baseman Edouard Julien to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Mike Yastrzemski to 3rd. Mauricio Dubón out at 2nd. Drake Baldwin out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Mike Yastrzemski pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mike Yastrzemski grounds out, first baseman TJ Rumfield to pitcher Victor Vodnik.

notableEvents.label: Mike Yastrzemski pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mike Yastrzemski pops out to first baseman TJ Rumfield in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
